name: hyp-consult-agent
description: HYP/UTAGE YouTube operation consultation agent for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the HYP/UTAGE lecture knowledge MCP and adds a /hyp-consult style workflow for source-grounded YouTube operation advice with dated citations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the HYP knowledge MCP to answer a YouTube operation question with dated sources.
